creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
---------- Forwarded message ----------
 From: Olivier Duchateau <duchateau.olivier@gmail.com>
 Date: 2010/9/24
 Subject: Re: ports/150252: [NEW PORT] sysutils/gigolo : frontend to
 connect/mount a remote filesystem
 To: miwi@freebsd.org, freebsd-ports-bugs@freebsd.org
 
 
 2010/9/24 =A0<miwi@freebsd.org>:
 > Synopsis: [NEW PORT] sysutils/gigolo : frontend to connect/mount a remote=
  filesystem
 >
 > State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
 > State-Changed-By: miwi
 > State-Changed-When: Fri Sep 24 02:42:23 UTC 2010
 > State-Changed-Why:
 > Hi
 >
 > this port should be call xfce4-gigolo because its wrote for the xfce desk=
 top.
 > u agree ?
 >
 
 Yes, I agree. I forgot to mention in 'pkg-message.in' this line :
 [Default Applications]
 
 New pkg-message.in' should look like :
 [Default Applications]
 x-directory/gnome-default-handler=3DThunar.desktop
 inode/directory=3DThunar.desktop
 x-directory/normal=3DThunar.desktop
 
 Thanks
 
 >
 > Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->miwi
 > Responsible-Changed-By: miwi
 > Responsible-Changed-When: Fri Sep 24 02:42:23 UTC 2010
 > Responsible-Changed-Why:
 > take
 >
 > http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3D150252
 >
 
 
 --=20
 olivier
